## What
<one paragraph: what does this PR change?>

## Why
<what problem does it solve, or what feature does it add?>

## How
<briefly: implementation approach, key files touched>

## Testing
- [ ] unit tests added/updated
- [ ] integration tests added/updated
- [ ] manual testing done
- [ ] screenshots/recordings attached (if UI)

## Related
- Closes #<issue>
- Related to #<other>

## Checklist
- [ ] Conventional commit message
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Documentation updated (if public-facing)
- [ ] CODEOWNERS review requested
